title: This Fair Value Gap Setup Paid Me $4,200 In One Trade
description: Stop guessing entries. This ICT fair value gap setup is one of the cleanest smart money concepts plays you'll ever see — and it's repeatable. Watch how the setup formed, where the entry triggered, and what the result looked like. R2F Trading breaks it down in 40 seconds. Follow for daily ICT setups and funded trader tips.
script: Stop. This one fair value gap setup paid $4,200 in a single trade. Most traders scrolled right past it. You're about to see exactly why. Price swept liquidity below the previous low. Classic smart money move. Then it left a clean fair value gap on the way back up. That gap was the signal. Entry was right inside that fair value gap. Stop below the order block. Target at the next high. Price filled the gap and never looked back. 1-to-4 risk-reward. Fair value gaps don't lie. Learn to read them and funded accounts get easier. Follow R2F Trading for setups like this every single day.
